title: South Korea's Kospi clocks best month in 28 years as tech optimism triumphs over Iran war worries
summary_full: The index's outsized gains have been driven largely by optimism around the artificial intelligence boom.
summary_public: The index's outsized gains have been driven largely by optimism around the artificial intelligence boom.
